properties.title: GEA Synthesis Map Snippet 0 (South Africa) - v0.0.12
properties.description: Snippet of the Global Ecosystems Atlas Synthesis Map (v0.0.12) in South Africa.

all_data.title: Full Snippet Data Package (ZIP)
all_data.description: A compressed archive containing 4 individual GeoTIFF files: the Synthesis Map, Standalone Ecosystems, Data Mask, and Source Data products.

gea_synthesis.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Synthesis Map
gea_synthesis.description: A 3-band multi-class Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF that depicts the distributions of ecosystem functional groups, biomes and realms.

gea_standalone.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Standalone Ecosystems
gea_standalone.description: A multiband Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF that depicts the distributions of ecosystems that cannot be served in a multiclass raster due to overlying or underlying other ecosystem types, such as pelagic ecosystems or sea ice.

gea_data_mask.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Data Mask
gea_data_mask.description: A 3-band Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF with bands intended to support analyses of the gea_synthesis and gea_standalone data products.

gea_sources.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Source Data
gea_sources.description: A 3-band Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF with bands that depict aspects of the source data, such as source data id, the year the data were produced and the native cell size of source data.
